description: A large horizontal card highlighting a featured story with image, metadata (date, category, reading time), headline, description, and a read-more CTA.

FR-01.title: Card Image
FR-01.description: The card MUST display a featured image on the left side occupying approximately 50% of the card width.

FR-02.title: Article Metadata
FR-02.description: The card MUST display date, category, and optionally reading time.
acceptance: Reading time displayed as 'X Minute Read'

FR-03.title: Story Title
FR-03.description: The card MUST display the story title as a prominent heading.
acceptance: H4 heading, F37 Lineca Medium, 30px desktop

FR-04.title: Description Text
FR-04.description: The card MUST display a brief description/summary of the story.

FR-05.title: CTA Link
FR-05.description: The card MUST include a 'Read story' CTA link.
acceptance: Text: 'Read story' followed by arrow icon

FR-06.title: Entire Card Clickable
FR-06.description: The entire card area MUST be wrapped in a single link element.
acceptance: Clicking anywhere on the card navigates to the story detail page
Link wraps both image and content areas
Hover state applies to entire card

FR-07.title: Responsive Behavior
FR-07.description: The card MUST stack vertically on tablet and mobile viewports.
acceptance: Desktop: Horizontal layout (image left, content right)
Tablet (<768px): Image stacks on top, content below

accessibility.AC-01: Card link MUST have descriptive accessible name including the story title
accessibility.AC-02: Image MUST have meaningful alt text
accessibility.AC-03: Reading time and date should be visually distinguishable but also programmatically available
